notes: v2.8.0 (2026-07-10T01:54:17Z) minor release ~29h after v2.7.0. Two load-bearing new primitives: (a) to_cli() accepts model= parameter for agents without preset models — CLI-ergonomics improvement on model-injection primitive; (b) bundled chat UI upgraded to 2.0.0 (Agent.to_web() now targets Agent SDK v7) — web-interface adapter surface bump. Bug-fix cluster: Tool max_retries + Tool timeout + ToolOutput max_retries + Agent tool_timeout parameter-validation added; ConcurrencyLimit + ConcurrencyLimiter max_queued validation; JsonSchemaTransformer allOf schema-composition fix on function-signature schemas; empty/thinking-only responses no longer incorrectly reuse previous text as output (Fable/Sonnet-thinking-mode adapter-boundary bug). Nine-releases-in-twelve-days cadence (v2.1.0 06-29, v2.2.0 07-01, v2.3.0 07-02, v2.4.0 07-03, v2.5.0 07-04, v2.5.1 07-07, v2.6.0 07-08 [morning], v2.7.0 07-08 [evening], v2.8.0 07-09/10). Kit-recommended pin advances pydantic-ai>=2.7.0 → pydantic-ai>=2.8.0 for consumers who want to_cli() model parameter + chat UI 2.0 + parameter-validation + allOf + thinking-only-response fix. Severity ⚠. Optional integration paths deferred to Monthly Integration: KB-01 §adapter-boundary empty/thinking-only-response-text-reuse fix folds with 07-08 pydantic-ai HTTPX event-hooks preservation + LangChain Anthropic cache-marker sanitization + LangChain-openai Pydantic serializer-warning suppression cluster into a widening 07-08/07-09 adapter-boundary-hygiene arc; KB-01 §prompts-as-code to_cli() model parameter CLI-injection primitive; KB-06 §hosted-agent-safety Tool/ToolOutput/Agent/ConcurrencyLimit-boundary parameter-validation hosted-agent-config-fidelity primitive; templates/shared/AGENTS.md Agent.to_web() chat-UI 2.0 web-consumer-surface primitive if a kit-recommended to_web() skill emerges. Aggregation candidate for Weekly Synthesis 2026-28.
